claimText: Recently, Supreme Court in Umadevi v. Government of Tamil Nadu, 2025 ruled that maternity leave is an essential component of a woman’s reproductive rights, thereby reinforcing constitutional and human rights of working women.

claimText: - Constitutional Protection: A woman’s right to reproductive choices is protected under Article 21, as a part of personal liberty (Suchita Srivastava v. Chandigarh Administration case).
